title: Blockixel's Amethyst Shield
description: Craft, Charge, Burst and Bedazzle your way through the environment and foes with the Amethyst Shield inspired from Blockixel Artistry!
body:
![Render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e5277f15a13a8b94e37a3fbf8341d9f54f2c27e.png)

# Blockixel's Amethyst Shield


Blockixel's Amethyst Shield is a datapack that roughly introduces the Concept present in Blockixel Artistry to minecraft through the form of a datapack,
it is a personal project and not, associated with Blockixel Artistry.


It is still rough around the edges and i would like to improve it, balance it ,refine it and perhaps add other additions from Blockixel Artistry to the best of my ability.

## To Use:
  Download both the datapack and the resourcepack, as both are required.
  Gui scale should be at 2 so the amethyst edges are shown correctly



________________________________________________________________________________________________

# - Craft it! -

![craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/629527112ad86897a62393b85548852d0aecc05e.png)

# - Charge it! -
By sprinting, jumping and blocking attacks

 ![charge](https://i.imgur.com/6wi2WDW.gif)

 
# - Reach new areas! -
By when being charged, blocking in the air to block falls or reach higher, or by blocking while sprinting to dash forwards

 ![jump](https://i.imgur.com/2hWvaZ9.gif)
 ![dash](https://i.imgur.com/hzcKXHm.gif)
 ![fall](https://i.imgur.com/2EnIMg3.gif)
 
# - Bewilder your enemies! -
By Crouch blocking to blast them away, or by dashing and getting a hefty damage boost

 ![https://i.imgur.com/rDcFmUd.gif](https://i.imgur.com/rDcFmUd.gif)
 ![https://i.imgur.com/5hR6epw.gif](https://i.imgur.com/5hR6epw.gif)
    
# - Heal it! -
By throwing your damaged shield onto budding amethyst

![https://i.imgur.com/2STg3Lc.gif](https://i.imgur.com/2STg3Lc.gif)

# - Go even Further! -
Keep charging it to SUPERCHARGE it, allowing you to use your abilities twice and reach higher
 
![https://i.imgur.com/xLsC69C.gif](https://i.imgur.com/xLsC69C.gif)
![https://i.imgur.com/NwlOT8t.gif](https://i.imgur.com/NwlOT8t.gif)
![https://i.imgur.com/6YkOVnX.gif](https://i.imgur.com/6YkOVnX.gif)
